prompt: Render the inventory screen from this RPG game as a physical, top-down photo of a real adventurer's leather pouch with all the items laid out neatly beside it.
prompt_refined:
Generate a top-down, realistic photograph of an adventurer's open, distressed leather pouch lying on a rustic wooden surface. Surrounding the pouch, the items from the RPG inventory screen in image 1 are neatly laid out.
On the left side of the pouch, a vertical arrangement of armor includes a dark, fur-trimmed helmet, a scaled chest piece, gauntlets, plated leggings, and heavy boots.
On the right side of the pouch, an ornate blue amulet, two blue rings, and a red, spiky club weapon are vertically aligned.
To the lower-left of the pouch, a green, shield-like off-hand item is placed.
Below the pouch, arranged horizontally, are an ornate gold goblet, intricate silver gears, a rolled parchment scroll, and a small human skull.
In the bottom-right area, a cluster of six faceted gems is present: white, blue, red, green, purple, and yellow.
objects: on the left side of the pouch, a dark, fur-trimmed helmet
on the left side of the pouch, a scaled chest piece
on the right side of the pouch, an ornate blue amulet
on the right side of the pouch, a red, spiky club weapon
to the lower-left of the pouch, a green, shield-like off-hand item
below the pouch, an ornate gold goblet
below the pouch, a small human skull
in the bottom-right area, a cluster of six faceted gems
